Document:
## This is an English community. - Typed messages in all channels must be in English. We do not moderate other languages. - Your characters may use the game mechanics provided (usually found in traits) to speak "different languages" for roleplay, but your actual typed text must remain in English.
## Why - We are not currently, and do not plan, to recruit staff fluent in other languages to moderate them. - Translation tools can be unreliable and are not integrated well into the game.
## Non-English Options - There are many servers that allow or focus on other languages. You are highly encouraged to play on servers that allow languages you are fluent in for the best experience.
